rationale: Review 1's findings (duplicate hb0, field_simp patch, rfl step) are real but all minor or speculative — the kind that get a 'nit:' comment, not a blocked PR. Review 2 misses the duplicate hb0 but that's a trivial one-line cleanup. Neither review surfaces a correctness issue, and acting on Review 1's guidance would produce only marginally cleaner code without meaningfully improving the PR.
